description: Authority map for Cici governed-state writes. Defines who may write what, through which mechanism.

canonical.description: Human-controlled governed state writes. Authoritative. Requires explicit owner action — direct edit or approved proposal.
canonical.how: direct file edit, or proposal approved via proposals/queue/ review

proposal.description: Proposal-only writes by agents or automations. Creates proposal artifacts but does NOT update governed state directly. Requires owner approval before any governed-state surface changes.

operational.description: Operational, cache, index, and sync writes. Support runtime functionality. Not canonical truth — may be reconstructed or overwritten.
operational.who: Supabase Edge Functions, MCP server, sync scripts
operational.how: direct write to operational layer (Supabase database, function runtime)

ephemeral.description: Ephemeral runtime state. Never committed to git. Excluded by .gitignore.
